case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. OCEAN SASH & DOOR, INC. AND ITS SUCCESSORS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT OCEAN SASH & DOOR, INC. AND ITS SUCCESSORS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
